issue_body_preview:
after 72ed5913 i cant load the react client:

```
Error: Function called outside component initialization
```

which traces back to svelte calling `get_current_component` after importing svelte in [src/client.js](https://github.com/boardgameio/boardgame.io/blob/72ed591310bec944cbb3b7eba458726b
test_description_zh: 在浏览器中加载使用 React 客户端（boardgame.io 的 React client）的页面，观察页面是否能正常渲染，控制台是否出现错误信息。
expected_result_zh: React 客户端页面能够正常加载和渲染，控制台不出现 'Function called outside component initialization' 错误，游戏界面正常显示并可交互。
